message:
fix(web): route tokio imports through runtime_compat abstraction layer (ft-e34d9.10.8.1)

Replace direct tokio::select!, tokio::signal, and tokio::task::JoinError
references in web/server.rs and web/sse.rs with runtime_compat re-exports.
This eliminates production-code tokio "leaks" that bypass the migration
abstraction, making future asupersync cutover cleaner.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
